name: 2am Mini-App Creation
summary: Recurring 2:00 AM mini-app project. Apr 24: The Fermentation Atlas — interactive explorer of 20 major fermentation processes (kimchi, cheese, wine, soy sauce, yogurt, etc.) with filterable card grid, detail modals, and warm organic design.
nextStep: Apr 25: Choose new mini-app concept. Consider rotating back to vineyard/engineering topics or mission-advancement ideas.
